compiled_state.title: RED: Add design context dispatch eval test case for sprint
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Add a promptfoo eval test case to `plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml` that asserts the sprint skill passes design manifest + revision image paths to implementation sub-agents when a story has design:approved tag.

### Test scenario
When dispatching a sub-agent for a task whose parent story has design:approved:
- The dispatch should include manifest path and revision image path
- The dispatch should specify model tier minimum sonnet
- The dispatch should include precedence rule (manifest=behavior, image=visual)
- The dispatch should include [NEEDS_REVIEW] contradiction flagging

This test MUST FAIL (RED) against current sprint SKILL.md and task-execution.md which have no design context dispatch.

### Files to modify
- Modify: plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

## TDD Requirement
The eval test must FAIL (RED) before SKILL.md and task-execution.md are modified.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Eval config contains design context dispatch test case
  Verify: grep -q 'design.*context\|manifest.*revision\|design:approved.*dispatch' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — YAML valid, acceptance criteria grep passes (count=4), test-suite-engine passes 22/22 standalone (batched tmpdir failures are pre-existing)
comments.author: Test
